column1: C[Lamb: it's been a long time since I've played
C[Santos Macario: how long have you been playing?
C[Lamb: I started years ago but haven't played for a while

Santos Macario: but is very dificult for me
C[Lamb: oh okay. do you want to practice with me?
Santos Macario: it woul be great
C[Lamb: okay, I sent you a friend request
Lamb: do you want to rematch?
Santos Macario: how do you go up a kyu?
Santos Macario: each victory is a kyu?
Lamb: I think you just have to play more. not sure.
Lamb: I am not too familiar with this website

Lamb: well basically if you surround a stone u capture it

innovator94: do you have to surround the other persons pellets

C[innovator94: duck you're doing so bad omg
C[Lamb: if you surround a stone or a group of stones that are connected
thebestsam: my teamleader said he sees the issue on his machine too
Lamb: your stone at C6 is almost surrounded
Lamb: you have to extend it
Lamb: when two stones are touching, they are more solid
Lamb: takes more stones to surround them

Lamb: before it was just one place

thebestsam: he will get back to me soon
